visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a gray flat cap, glasses, and a gray hoodie stands in a studio with a neutral gray background flanked by orange vertical bars. He gestures actively with his hands while speaking. Social media handles and a 'miko' brand logo are fixed at the top. (2) A close-up graphic of a smartphone screen shows the green LINE app icon. Colorful text boxes slide into the frame. (3) The scene returns to the man. Graphical icons of a female 'fake buyer' and an elderly 'seller' appear above his hands, connected by a circular arrow and scam-related text. (4) A screenshot of a LINE chat interface is shown, featuring messages from a 'Mr. Lin' regarding order issues. (5) A screen recording of the LINE app interface appears, highlighting the 'Share Screen' button in a pink box. (6) The man returns to full view, pointing upward as large warning text overlays in red and white flash across the screen to emphasize his message.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 詐騙新手法!. [Logo]: 3c意思Tim哥 @3ctim miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 結合LINE視訊. (3) [Subtitle]: 分享螢幕功能. (4) [Subtitle]: 刑事局指出. (5) [Variety]: (假買家) 詐騙 詐騙案增多 (賣家). (6) [Subtitle]: 藉由假扮買家私訊賣家. (7) [Variety]: 我想買這個! (假買家). (8) [Subtitle]: 但需要實際填寫物流訂購時. (9) [Subtitle]: 無法成功. [Variety]: 假藉各種原因. (10) [Subtitle]: 進而要求賣家. (11) [Subtitle]: 聯絡所謂的LINE客服. (12) [Subtitle]: 或第三方物流. (13) [Subtitle]: 填寫所謂的. (14) [Slogan]: 託運認證 實名認證 開通金流服務. (15) [Subtitle]: 謊稱收到貨才會撥款. (16) [Subtitle]: 保障雙方權益. (17) [Subtitle]: 讓賣家依照指示. (18) [Subtitle]: 打開LINE視訊的「螢幕分享」功能. (19) [Subtitle]: 操作網路銀行. (20) [Subtitle]: 進行託運認證. (21) [Subtitle]: 但其實是透過螢幕分享. (22) [Variety]: 注意再注意!. (23) [Subtitle]: 竊取網銀帳號密碼. (24) [Subtitle]: 及OTP碼. (25) [Subtitle]: 小心啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the content.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a gray flat cap, transparent-framed glasses, and a light gray hoodie with a darker gray inner hood.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, professional studio setting with a solid gray back wall and orange decorative side pillars.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice begins the narration immediately with an upbeat electronic BGM. A 'whoosh' SFX triggers as the main title text appears visually. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX marks the appearance of the LINE icon graphic. The vocal delivery is fast and enunciated. (3) A 'pop' SFX is heard as graphical icons for buyer and seller are introduced. The music continues with a consistent, rhythmic beat. (4) Another 'whoosh' sound transition occurs as the video switches to show the LINE chat screenshot. (5) A series of quick 'click' and 'whoosh' SFX underscore the highlights on the screen sharing interface, matching the visual speed ramp. (6) The vocal arousal increases toward the end to emphasize the warning, culminating in a final high-pitched 'ding' as the brand logo is featured at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Explanation of Scam Mechanism -> Warning/Precaution.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To alert social media users about a sophisticated new scam on the LINE platform that uses the screen-sharing feature to steal banking credentials.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Persistent brand logo 'miko' throughout the video and social media handles of '3ctim'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes fast-paced social media editing techniques, including frequent sound effects and vibrant text overlays, to deliver a serious security warning in a highly engaging format.
